title: Scenario Analysis: In a scenario analysis, if the best-case cash flow is...
summary: Calculate the range of NPVs under best-case and worst-case cash flow scenarios.
prompt: In a scenario analysis, if the best-case cash flow is $500,000 and the worst-case is $100,000, what is the range of possible NPVs if the discount rate is 10%?
solution: NPV in best case = PV of $500,000 in one year = $500,000 / 1.10 = $454,545. NPV in worst case = $100,000 / 1.10 = $90,909. Therefore, the range is $454,545 - $90,909 = $363,636.
